modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Frequently asked questions about the Experience portal.

full_description_text:  
User is asking about common questions. They want to know more about the Experience portal. There are many FAQs that need to be clarified. The user is confused and needs help understanding the portal features.
short_description: Frequently asked questions about the Experience portal.
